CSV Prepared dataset Downloads the harmonized, cleaned rows used to generate the dashboard. 4 rows prepared for analysis.
JSON Decision handoff log Includes evidence coverage, join review, quality caveats, and transformation history. 2 recorded steps available.
KIT Project kit Downloads a JSON kit with README text, prepared CSV, schema, chart config, and handoff log. Built for second-pass review without saving data in the app.
PNG Dashboard image Captures the full generated dashboard as a shareable static image. 10 charts with recommended insights expanded.
PDF Dashboard report Packages the dashboard, quality checks, and transformation summary for review. Includes 0 quality issues and 2 transformations.
